issues.title: Improve retrieval label wording
issues.reason: Authority and status labels exist but need clearer user-facing wording.
issues.next_action: Add explicit display labels for approved, pending_review, diagnostic_only, and generated_report_diagnostic results.
issues.proof_required_to_close: Sample retrieval output shows approved, pending, diagnostic, and generated labels clearly.

issues.title: Add weak-match warning / score threshold
issues.reason: Broad lexical matches can surface low-score results.
issues.next_action: Add match_strength and weak_match_warning to retrieval output, with very low scores hidden or grouped as possible weak matches.
issues.proof_required_to_close: Retrieval output includes match_strength and weak_match_warning.

issues.title: Split target exercises into per-exercise chunks
issues.reason: One large chunk reduces traceability and precision.
issues.next_action: Create stable per-exercise chunks with exercise IDs, unit links, and evidence metadata.
issues.proof_required_to_close: Each target exercise has a stable chunk ID, exercise ID, unit links, and evidence metadata.

issues.title: Evidence-anchor coverage report for retrieval
issues.reason: Retrieval partially surfaces evidence anchors, but coverage needs visibility.
issues.next_action: Generate a report showing which chunk/entity types have evidence_ids and which do not.
issues.proof_required_to_close: Report shows evidence_id coverage by chunk type and entity type.
